name: k/d with lamb dog food
description: when dogs have damage to kidney tissues, the kidneys cannot perform as well as before, like filtering and reabsorbing nutrients. the condition is not reversible, but progression may be slowed. therapeutic foods for kidney conditions are designed to help reduce workload on the kidneys, enabling them to function more effectively. dogs with decreased kidney function may experience loss of appetite and their food intake might decline. reduced phosphorus & sodium, enriched with omega-3 fatty acids activbiome+ kidney defenseactivates the gut microbiome to reduce harmful waste products with optimized
